narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive investment in AI hardware and software is driving growth across semiconductors and enterprise technology.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Positive clinical data and market expansion for weight-loss drugs continue to drive interest in the obesity medication sector.

narratives.name: Financial Sector Resilience
narratives.thesis: Financial institutions are showing strength through buybacks and resilient earnings despite broader macroeconomic uncertainty.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising oil prices and accelerating inflation are creating a divergence where energy stocks thrive while broad equity indices face headwinds.

narratives.name: Crypto and Meme Volatility
narratives.thesis: High volatility in speculative assets is driven by earnings reports and shifting acquisition narratives.
